chapter_title.en: The Limits of Ablution, Its Order and Reward

text: 104 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «اِفْتَحُوا عُيُونَكُمْ عِنْدَ اَلْوُضُوءِ لَعَلَّهَا لاَ تَرَى نَارَ جَهَنَّمَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.104 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"'Open your eyes during ablution, so that they may not see the fire of Hell.'".
